titleJa: open runtime と managed platform が、同じ議論の中で交わり始める
titleEn: Open runtimes and managed platforms are starting to converge in the same conversation
summaryJa: 2025年5月時点では、Google の ADK / A2A / Agent Engine、Anthropic の Claude Code、Microsoft の Semantic Kernel Agents GA がそろい、agent stack を open / managed の二者択一で捉えにくくなっていた。
summaryEn: By May 2025, Google's ADK, A2A, and Agent Engine messaging, Anthropic's Claude Code, and Microsoft's Semantic Kernel Agents GA made it harder to think about the agent stack as a simple open-versus-managed choice.

publishedSources.label: Magentic-One: A Generalist Multi-Agent System for Solving Complex Tasks
The BrowserGym Ecosystem for Web Agent Research
OpenAI: New tools for building agents
AWS: Amazon Bedrock announces general availability of multi-agent collaboration
Google Cloud: Build and manage multi-system agents with Vertex AI
Google Developers Blog: A2A, a new era of agent interoperability
Microsoft: Semantic Kernel Agents are now generally available
